name: mythical
stylePhrase: fantasy 3D game asset render, luminous vs smoldering rim lighting, high detail, consistent top-left studio lighting, ornate, intricate surface detail, richly decorated

w.label: celestial creature
w.palette: polished pearl and gold, luminous white plumage and scales, soft radiant glow along the edges

b.label: shadow creature
b.palette: obsidian and ember, dark charcoal scales, glowing orange-red ember cracks along the edges

pieces.q: a graceful {SIDE} sovereign, more slender than the king
